perturbation.original_text: All correspondence, inquiries, offers to purchase and negotiations relating to the Transaction will be conducted exclusively through Vladi Private Islands. The Client and Authorised Recipients agree only to contact the property owner and/or the affiliates of the property owner through Vladi Private Islands .
perturbation.changed_text: All correspondence, inquiries, offers to purchase and negotiations relating to the Transaction will be conducted through Vladi Private Islands. The Client and Authorised Recipients agree to contact the property owner and/or the affiliates of the property owner directly.
perturbation.explanation: By changing 'exclusively through Vladi Private Islands' to 'through Vladi Private Islands', and changing 'only to contact through Vladi Private Islands' to 'to contact directly', the changed text now allows, or even encourages, direct contact with the property owner. This contradicts the original intent of maintaining control over communications and creates uncertainty as to the expected communication protocol.
perturbation.contradicted_text: All correspondence, inquiries, offers to purchase and negotiations relating to the Transaction will be conducted through Vladi Private Islands. The Client and Authorised Recipients agree to contact the property owner and/or the affiliates of the property owner directly.
perturbation.justification: The original text explicitly states that all communication must be 'exclusively through Vladi Private Islands'. The changed text removes 'exclusively' and alters the second sentence to allow direct contact with the property owner. This directly contradicts the initial requirement for exclusive communication through Vladi Private Islands, creating a clear inconsistency and in-text contradiction. The changed text now directly clashes with the contradicted text, because the changed text allows direct contact, while the original text, which is the contradicted text, prohibits it.
